_description: Shared game board elements visible to and affecting all players. Distinct from player_board.json (per-faction) and cards.json (card definitions).

lawyer_market._description: 4 face-up Lawyer cards available for acquisition, backed by a face-down replenishment deck. When a card is acquired, the gap is filled from the top of the deck.

step_1.rule: Shuffle all 8 Lawyer cards into a face-down deck.

step_2.rule: Draw 4 cards from the top of the deck and place them face-up to fill the market slots.

on_acquisition.description: Player takes the acquired card from its face-up slot.
If the replenishment deck has cards remaining, draw the top card and place it face-up to fill the vacancy.
If the deck is empty, the slot remains empty for the rest of the game.

standard._note: Standard fee is the printed card cost PLUS an additional $4.

threshold_discount._note: At PR thresholds −7 or +8, player pays only the printed card cost — the additional $4 is waived. See player_board.json tracks.pr.threshold_markers.

activist_market._description: 4 face-up Activist cards available for acquisition, backed by a face-down replenishment deck. Same sliding market pattern as the Lawyer market.

step_1.rule: Shuffle all 4 Activist cards into a face-down deck.

step_2.rule: Draw all 4 cards and place them face-up. With only 4 cards total, the market starts full and the replenishment deck is empty.

on_acquisition.description: Player takes the acquired card from its face-up slot.
Draw the top card from the replenishment deck (if any) to fill the vacancy.
If the deck is empty (likely after the first acquisition), the slot remains empty.

strategy_deck._description: Face-down deck of Strategy cards. No face-up market — cards are dealt to players at setup and drawn individually during play.

step_1.rule: Shuffle all 8 Strategy cards into a face-down deck.

step_2.rule: Deal 3 cards to each player. Remaining cards stay face-down as the draw pile.

on_draw.description: When a player draws a Strategy card (e.g. via Activist D or Sneaky Pete), take the top card from this deck.

discard.description: Strategy cards are discarded after use into a separate discard pile. When the draw pile is exhausted, the discard pile is reshuffled to form a new draw deck.

event_deck._description: The shared Event card draw pile and active slot. Always 9 cards, always used in full regardless of player count. Cards cycle — after resolution a card returns to the bottom of the deck.

setup.rule: Shuffle all 9 event cards and place face-down as the draw pile. No filtering — the full deck is always used.

draw_pile.description: The remaining unresolved event cards. Players cannot look at these.

active_slot.description: The currently revealed event card. Resolved immediately when flipped.

on_reveal.description: Take the top card from the draw pile and place it face-up in the active slot.
Immediately resolve the card's effect (protest phase, drought, snow melt, or SC session).
Place the resolved card face-down at the bottom of the draw pile. The deck cycles indefinitely.

docket._description: The Supreme Court case queue. An ordered array of SC case IDs for the active factions only. All cases are face-up and visible to all players at all times. Size is determined at setup and fixed for the game.

size_by_player_count._description: C(n, 2) — all unique pairings of active factions.

step_1.rule: Keep only SC case cards where BOTH plaintiff.id AND defendant.id are in the active faction set.
step_1.disposition_of_removed: Out of the game entirely — not shuffled in, not set aside.

step_2.rule: Shuffle the remaining cases and place them all face-up in the docket. All cases are visible from turn 1. Docket size is now fixed for the remainder of the game.

on_resolution.description: Remove the case at index 0. Winner/loser determined, rewards and penalties applied.
All remaining cases shift forward: index 1 becomes the new active case at index 0, index 2 becomes index 1, and so on.
The just-resolved case is placed at the end of the array. It remains face-up. No reveal step needed — all cases are already visible.

mutations.description: The player chooses any two cases currently in the docket array and swaps their positions. Both are face-up (all cases always are).
constraints: Cannot swap a case that has already been resolved this round.
The active case at index 0 may be swapped.
